{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Jo ikkatrs/ kas to darra/ 
un wiſs/ kas netaijni darra/ tas 
irr tam KUNGA M tawam Dee-
wam weena Negantiba.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Atminni/ ko tee Amalekt-
text tew darrija us to Zettu/ kad
tu no Egiptes-Semmes iggahji.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 18,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ka winni tew pretti zehlahs
us Zettu/ un kawe tawâ Starpâ
tohs Pakkalejus/ wiſsus Nespeh-
zigns pakkat tew/ kad tu peekuf-
fis un Ahbans biji/ un tee ne
docht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 19,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Kad nu tas KUNGS
taws Deews tew irr Duffeschann
dewis/no wiſseem tawem Eenaid-
nekeem apkahrt tai Semmê/ ko
tas KUNGS taws Deews tew
par Jhpaschunu dohs winnu ee-
mantojamu Teefu turreht/ tad
buhs tew to Amalekitexu Pee-
minneschannu isdeldeht/ kas ap-
pakſch Debbes irr. Ne atsmirsti
to.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ta XXVI. Nodalla.
To Augfu Pirmajee : 1/2. Un ta defmita Tee,
sa jadohd tam Preesteram un teem Nabba,
geem : 12/ 13. Pakfnbbinaschana us
Paklausischanu : 16.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "U R kad tu tai Semmê
nahkti/ ko tas KUNGS
taws Deews tew par Jh-
paschunu dohs/ un tu to par ee-
mantojamu Teefu turreft/ un
eeksch tahs dsihwofi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad buhs tew no wiſseem
Semmes Augtu Pirmajeem
nt/ ko tu faxemfi no tawas
"
    },
    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Deews tew dohs/ nn buhs toh
kahdâ Kurwi likt/ nn us to We-
tu eet/ ko tas KUNGS taw
Deews isredsehs/ ka winna
Wahrds tur mahje.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tew buhs pee ta Pre-
stera nahkt/ kas tai Laika buhs
nn us winnu fazziht: Es isfaff
schodeen preekſch to KUNGu ta-
wu Deewu/ ka es nahzts efimu ta-
Semmê/ ko tas KUNGS mut-
fu Tehweem sveehrejs irr mum
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad buhs tarn Preesteram
to Kurwi no tawasRohkas xemt
un to vreekſch ta KUNGA taw
Deewa Altara likt.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad buhs teiw preekſch ta
KUNGA tawa Deewa athildeht
un fazziht: Mans Tehwes bije-
weens iggindis Sihreris/ un no-
gahje uhs Egiptes-Semini/ u-
mitte tur par Sveschineeku a-
mas Laudim/ bet winſch tappe tu-
par weenu leelu warrenu un wai-
rotu Tantu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Bet teeEgipteri darrija mum-
gruhti/un speede muhs/nn uslik-
muns gruhtu Kalpoſchanu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad brehzam mehs us ta
KUNGU muhfu Tehwu Deewu/
un tas KUNGS paklausija muh-
ft Balkini/ un eerandsija muh-
fas Behdas un muhfu Gruhtu-
mu/ nn muhfu Nospaidifcha-
nu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tas KUNGS istwedde
muhs no Egiptes-Semmes zaui-
stipru Rohku/ un issteepiu Elko-
nu/
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
